1UP will reward you earlier if your team takes a one-goal lead, e.g. 1-0, 2-1. Once settled, the final result no longer matters - win, lose or draw! If a match is abandoned and a team has gone one or more goals ahead then bets on that selection will still be paid as winners. SportyBet reserves the right to void selections for any integrity issues and abuse behaviours we identified.

Which team will win the match. If your team leads by 2 goals at any time, it will be considered a winner. Regular time only. *** Example: *** Bet on Home. The bet wins if Home wins but will be paid out early if Home leads by 2 goals at any time. *** Bet on Draw. The bet wins if the match ends in a Draw. *** Bet on Away. The bet wins if Away wins but will be paid out early if Away leads by 2 goals at any time.

EarlyGoals pays your Over bets immediately if a certain number of goals is scored by a certain minute: Over 1.5 - 1 goal scored by 10th minute (00:00 - 09:59) Over 2.5 - 2 goals scored by 30th minute (00:00 - 29:59) Over 3.5 - 3 goals scored by 50th minute (00:00 - 49:59)  Once settled, the final result no longer matters! If the EarlyGoals condition is not met, your selection is treated as a normal Over/Under bet.
